promotional.title: Promotional Content Templates
promotional.announcement: 🎉 Exciting news! {{announcement}} Check it out now! #{{hashtag}}
promotional.discount: 💸 Limited time offer! Get {{discount}}% off {{product}}. Use code {{code}}. #Sale #{{brand}}
promotional.event: 📅 Join us for {{event}} on {{date}}! Don't miss out on {{highlight}}. #Event #{{location}}

educational.title: Educational Content Templates
educational.tip: 💡 Pro tip: {{tip}} What's your experience with this? #Tips #{{topic}}
educational.howTo: 🔧 How to {{action}}: {{steps}} Try it and let us know how it goes! #HowTo #{{skill}}
educational.fact: 🧠 Did you know? {{fact}} Share your thoughts in the comments! #DidYouKnow #{{subject}}
educational.tutorial: 📚 Step-by-step guide: {{title}}. {{preview}} Full tutorial in our bio! #Tutorial #{{topic}}

engagement.title: Engagement Content Templates
engagement.question: 🤔 Quick question: {{question}} Drop your answer below! #{{topic}} #Community
engagement.poll: 📊 We want to hear from you! {{pollQuestion}} Vote and tell us why! #Poll #{{subject}}
engagement.challenge: 💪 Challenge time! {{challenge}} Tag a friend who should try this! #Challenge #{{theme}}
engagement.share: ✨ Share your {{topic}} story! We love hearing from our community. Tag us! #ShareYourStory #{{community}}

seasonal.title: Seasonal Content Templates
seasonal.newYear: 🥳 New year, new goals! What's on your {{year}} wishlist? Share below! #NewYear #Goals{{year}}
seasonal.winter: ❄️ Cozy winter days call for {{activity}}. What's your favorite winter {{item}}? #Winter #Cozy

suggestions.addHashtags: Consider adding relevant hashtags to increase discoverability
suggestions.shortenText: Try shortening your text for better engagement
suggestions.addEmoji: Adding emojis can make your content more engaging
suggestions.includeQuestion: Asking a question can boost engagement
suggestions.optimizeHashtags: Use a mix of popular and niche hashtags
suggestions.improveReadability: Break up long paragraphs for better readability
suggestions.addPersonality: Add more personality to connect with your audience

scores.excellent: Excellent content! This should perform very well.
scores.good: Good content with room for improvement.
scores.average: Average content. Consider applying our suggestions.

tips: Use up to 30 hashtags for maximum reach
Stories expire in 24 hours, use highlights to save important ones
Post when your audience is most active
Use high-quality, visually appealing images
instagram.bestPractices: For Instagram, focus on visual storytelling and use relevant hashtags.

tips: Posts with images get 2.3x more engagement
Ask questions to encourage comments
Share behind-the-scenes content
Use Facebook Groups to build community
facebook.bestPractices: Facebook rewards content that generates meaningful conversations.

tips: Keep tweets concise and punchy
Use 1-2 hashtags for optimal engagement
Tweet during peak hours (12-1pm, 5-6pm)
Engage with trending topics when relevant
twitter.bestPractices: Twitter is about real-time engagement and conversations.

tips: Share professional insights and industry news
Use a professional tone
Include relevant keywords in your posts
Post during business hours for better reach
linkedin.bestPractices: LinkedIn content should be professional and provide value to your network.

tips: Create authentic, entertaining content
Use trending sounds and effects
Post consistently for better algorithm performance
Engage with comments quickly
tiktok.bestPractices: TikTok rewards creativity and authentic content that entertains.
